query: We have 140 open tickets in Linear. A lot of them haven't been touched in months. Help us groom.
expected_behavior: Defines the purge criteria: stale (>30 days untouched), orphaned (unassigned with no owner), and duplicate
Produces a targeted purge plan — not 'review all 140 tickets one by one'
Asks for the ticket list or a filter view before making specific recommendations
Does not delete tickets without explicit user confirmation — flags for user approval
Calculates the cognitive load reduction: X tickets removed = Y fewer context switches per sprint
